---
title: "Modeling of protein-protein interaction and search for key residues by machine learning of a protein complex in the jasmonic acid route in Arabidopsis thaliana" 
description: | 
  This poster presentation was part of the XLIII Ecuadorian National Biology Conference at Urcuqui, Ecuador.
date: "2019-11-28"
image: XLIII_National_Biology_Conference_2019.png
categories:
- 🗺️Poster presentation 
- 🌾Agriculture
- ⚛️Molecular dynamics
- 🧠Machine learning
- 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event](https://www.yachaytech.edu.ec/jnb2019/){.btn target=_blank} [{{< iconify uil presentation >}} Poster (Spanish)](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/354369932_Modelamiento_de_la_interaccion_proteina-proteina_y_busqueda_de_residuos_clave_por_aprendizaje_automatico_de_un_complejo_de_proteinas_en_la_ruta_del_acido_jasmonico_en_Arabidopsis_thaliana){.btn target=_blank}

You can find more details about this project [here][jaz-mic]. 

[jaz-mic]: ../../projects/JAZ-MYC_coupling/
